hero.title: Become a PlanetTalk Partner
hero.subtitle2: Earn When You Help Families Stay Connected Across Borders
hero.description: Join a fast-growing network of partners helping friends and families abroad stay close, while earning every time they use PlanetTalk.
hero.info: Thousands of people in the UK, US, Canada, France, and Ireland are using the PlanetTalk app to connect and support their loved ones via cheap international calls, easy airtime and data credit recharges and top-ups, e-vouchers, gift cards, and utility bill payments at unbeatable rates.
hero.helpThemStay: You can help them stay connected with loved ones and make some money in the process!
hero.ctaDescription: Join us today and turn your connections into cash!

reasons.title: Earn Ongoing Commissions
reasons.description: Receive commissions on each customer for 24 months from their first successful top-up.

reasons.title: Unique Partner Code
reasons.description: Share your unique code with your network, they use it once and you earn commission every time they top up.

reasons.title: Make a Positive Impact
reasons.description: Help the diaspora connect and support their families back home without breaking the bank!

step1.title: Apply Online
step1.description: Complete our simple application form and accept terms & conditions

step2.title: Get Your Code
step2.description: Receive your unique partner code and portal access credentials via email

step3.title: Start Earning
step3.description: Share your code, track customer top-ups, and earn monthly commissions

individual.title: Individual Partner
individual.description: Share PlanetTalk with your friends and family — earn every time they use the app.
benefits: Sign up and submit your details
Earn commission for up to 24 months on every referral
Track your earnings and request payouts anytime from your dashboard

business.title: Business Partner
business.description: Turn your customers into recurring income with PlanetTalk. Perfect for shops, restaurants, and service providers serving international communities.
benefits: Register your business and get verified
Get a dedicated account manager to support you
Receive your unique partner code + branded marketing materials
Get onboarded step-by-step by our team
Track earnings and request payouts from your dashboard

features.title: Your Partner Portal Dashboard
features.subtitle: Track your earnings, manage your referrals, and grow your telecommunications business with our comprehensive partner portal.

agentCode.title: Partner Code Management
agentCode.description: Your unique partner code is your key to earning. Share it easily and track its usage across all platforms.

tracking.title: Customer Usage Tracking
tracking.description: See exactly how many customers have used your partner code and monitor their top-up activities.

earnings.title: Monthly Earnings Reports
earnings.description: Receive detailed monthly earnings reports showing your commission breakdown and payment summaries.

training.title: Training & Resources
training.description: Access comprehensive training materials, marketing guides, and compliance documentation.

announcements.title: Announcements & Updates
announcements.description: Stay informed with important announcements, system updates, and new opportunities.

checklist.title: Getting Started Checklist
checklist.description: Follow our step-by-step onboarding checklist to get your partner business up and running quickly.

about.title: Your Partner Journey
about.subtitle: From application to earning monthly commissions - here's how our automated system works for you.

success.title: Application Submitted!
success.message: Thank you for your interest in becoming a PlanetTalk partner. We've received your application and will review it shortly.
success.nextStepsDescription: Our team will review your application within 2-3 business days. If approved, you'll receive an email with your partner credentials and next steps.
